validation_rows.subject: upstream_spec_binding
validation_rows.requirement: P4-SPEC-03 binds approved P4-SPEC-02, approved P4-SPEC-01, and current P3_BUILD_LOCK.
validation_rows.negative_case: upstream review decision or P3_BUILD_LOCK hash drift must fail

validation_rows.subject: golden_suite_determinism
validation_rows.requirement: Golden suite verifies expected output hashes and cannot rewrite expected outputs during release checks.
validation_rows.evidence: future golden regression tests assert no golden update in release mode
validation_rows.negative_case: golden expected output is rewritten while test passes

validation_rows.subject: integration_gate_coverage
validation_rows.requirement: Integration suite covers CLI, adapters, program driver, recovery, Human Gate, lock gates, and write scope.
validation_rows.evidence: future integration tests assert gate stop reports
validation_rows.negative_case: end-to-end run bypasses review or lock boundary

validation_rows.subject: release_suite_evidence
validation_rows.requirement: Release suite includes package dry-run, example project smoke, migration coverage, canonical report hash policy, and readiness packet verification.
validation_rows.evidence: future release tests assert all report hashes
validation_rows.negative_case: readiness passes without package or example smoke evidence

validation_rows.subject: release_hash_cycle_prevention
validation_rows.requirement: Readiness packet may include only release_lock_input_bundle_preview, while release_lock_input_bundle separately references release_readiness_packet_hash without embedding the readiness packet.
validation_rows.evidence: future release readiness tests assert no circular packet/bundle embedding
validation_rows.negative_case: readiness packet embeds bundle and bundle hashes readiness packet

validation_rows.subject: migration_coverage_rows
validation_rows.requirement: Every v3.1 capability row has supported status, target evidence, rationale, and review flag.
validation_rows.evidence: future migration coverage tests validate row contract
validation_rows.negative_case: legacy capability omitted or blocked row ignored

validation_rows.subject: package_manifest_safety
validation_rows.requirement: Package manifest excludes secrets, git internals, review decisions, release locks, and untracked release inputs.
validation_rows.evidence: future packaging tests validate included and excluded paths
validation_rows.negative_case: package includes credentials, .git data, or generated review decisions

validation_rows.subject: release_lock_input_boundary
validation_rows.requirement: Release lock input bundle reports eligibility but cannot create, rewrite, or delete DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK.
validation_rows.evidence: future release lock tests assert control/locks unchanged

validation_rows.subject: dirty_state_policy
validation_rows.requirement: Release readiness classifies clean, documented dirty, and blocked dirty states with dirty_state_records showing path, git status, release input impact, classification, reason, and required action.
validation_rows.evidence: future release readiness tests inject dirty states
validation_rows.negative_case: dirty release inputs are silently accepted

validation_rows.subject: implementation_workpack_partition
validation_rows.requirement: P4-SPEC-03 handoff partitions P4-IMPL-03, P4-IMPL-04, and P4-IMPL-05 ownership so future implementation scopes are not mixed.
validation_rows.negative_case: all release targets are assigned to multiple implementation workpacks without ownership boundaries

validation_rows.subject: semantic_boundary
validation_rows.requirement: P4 release, migration, package, and example specs cannot add product requirements, page elements, layout rules, or business contracts.
validation_rows.evidence: future negative tests reject forbidden output keys
validation_rows.negative_case: example project or migration map fills missing product semantics

validation_rows.subject: candidate_scope
validation_rows.requirement: P4-SPEC-03 candidate only writes its own candidate directory.
validation_rows.negative_case: candidate mutates repository code, locks, prior phases, or root P4 files
